uid.description: Unique identifier of the recording entity (e.g., "rec-abc123xyz")

recordingUrl.description: Pre-signed URL to access the recording file (e.g., "https://example.com/recordings/presigned-url")

size.description: The size of the recording in bytes (e.g., 1048576)

duration.description: The duration of the recording in seconds (e.g., 300)

recording_played.description: Whether the call recording has been played (e.g., false)

description: Recording details for a voice call, including a pre-signed access URL and playback metadata.
